indication: KISQALI (ribociclib tablets) is indicated, in combination with fulvestrant for the treatment of postmenopausal women, with HR-positive, HER2-negative advanced or metastatic breast cancer, as initial endocrine-based therapy or following disease progression on endocrine therapy.
description: Health Canada approved ribociclib, in combination with fulvestrant, for the treatment ostmenopausal women, with HR-positive, HER2-negative advanced or metastatic breast cancer, as initial endocrine-based therapy or following disease progression on endocrine therapy.
